findings.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  List element has direct children that are not allowed: figure [<ol type="a">]

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: Handwritten initials/signatures next to the FROM names are missing in the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows handwritten initials/marks next to 'Karen Higgins' (appears to be 'KH' with a flourish) and next to 'Brian Wrenn' (appears to be 'bjw'). The HTML conversion does not reproduce these handwritten marks.
